title: RSVP - 211info
text: COMMUNITY VOLUNTEER NETWORK RSVP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers volunteer opportunities. Participants receive supplemental insurance while on duty and may be eligible for mileage reimbursement to their volunteer site. Volunteer opportunities service opportunities that match their interests, skills, and schedules, including peer counseling and providing rides. 1 West Main Street Suite 303 Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Age 55 and older, must pass a criminal history background check Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 857-7780 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 646-3300 Main phone Main phone (541) 857-7780 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson, Josephine, Klamath Counties Services: Senior Corps Volunteer Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - FOSTER GRANDPARENT PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
